pi_items.source: Floreant POS 1.4 official documentation and setup scripts confirm HOME DELIVERY is one of four default order types. Task setup_task.sh explicitly updates this type.
Floreant POS 1.4 official documentation confirms DINE IN as default order type. Task setup_task.sh and verifier.py check that DINE IN remains visible after HOME DELIVERY is disabled.
Floreant POS 1.4 official documentation confirms TAKE OUT as default order type. Task setup_task.sh and verifier.py check that TAKE OUT remains visible after HOME DELIVERY is disabled.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on Floreant POS 1.4 build 1707b, an open-source restaurant point-of-sale system. It uses real data from the official distribution's pre-populated Derby database. The task targets HOME DELIVERY, one of four default order types in Floreant POS (alongside DINE IN, TAKE OUT, and RETAIL). The metadata accurately specifies that HOME DELIVERY is the target type to disable, and that DINE IN and TAKE OUT must remain visible. These order types are real features of the Floreant POS system, not synthetic constructs.
